body:
## Rationale

Mario Duplantier has the **highest CTR in the current GSC dataset** — 'mario duplantier gear' at **25% CTR, pos 6.5** (4 impr, 1 click). This is exceptional engagement. More Gojira content compounds this authority and pushes position toward page 1.

**Content gap confirmed:** 'the-way-of-all-flesh-drum-setup' exists (2008). 'from-mars-to-sirius-drum-setup' exists (2005). But **L'Enfant Sauvage (2012) has no dedicated article** — and it's Gojira's most critically acclaimed album (Grammy nominated 2013, broke through to mainstream metal audiences).

**Gear era difference:** L'Enfant Sauvage = distinctly different setup from From Mars to Sirius. Mario switched to DW drums and Meinl Byzance cymbals for this period. New content angle, not cannibalization.

## Status: already applied
`lenfant-sauvage-drum-setup` entry exists in `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` (3,459 words, 3 FAQ Q&As, internal links to mario-duplantier, from-mars-to-sirius-drum-setup, and the-way-of-all-flesh-drum-setup). `public/llms/articles/lenfant-sauvage-drum-setup.md` exists and is well-formed. Applied in commits #2041 and #2065. No changes needed.
title: SEO: Gojira — L'Enfant Sauvage Mario Duplantier drum setup article (25% CTR GSC signal)
